CustomField.formula:
CASE(RecordType.Name ,
'Marketing & Engagement Campaign',
CASE( Type , 'Online Events', CASE( Event_Sub_Type__c , 'IM Group Chat','Webinar', 'Webinars', 'Webinar', '') , 'Offline Events', CASE( Event_Sub_Type__c , 'Exhibition Booth','Congress', 'CDE/Hands-on Workshop', 'Lecture with hands-on', 'Conference/Seminar', 'Congress', 'Institution Program', 'Lecture', 'Table Workshop', 'Lecture with demo', '') , '') ,
'Learning Focused Program', CASE( Type , 'Online Events', CASE( Event_Sub_Type__c , 'IM Group Chat','Sales associates Workshop', 'Webinars', 'Sales associates Workshop', '') , 'Offline Events', CASE( Event_Sub_Type__c , 'CDE/Hands-on Workshop','Sales associates Workshop', 'Institution Program', 'Sales associates Workshop', 'Table Workshop', 'Sales associates Workshop', '') , '') , 'Sponsorships', CASE( Type , 'Online Events', CASE( Event_Sub_Type__c , 'IM Group Chat','Webinar', 'Webinars', 'Webinar', '') , 'Offline Events', CASE( Event_Sub_Type__c , 'Exhibition Booth','Congress', 'CDE/Hands-on Workshop', 'Lecture with hands-on', 'Conference/Seminar', 'Congress', 'Institution Program', 'Lecture', 'Table Workshop', 'Lecture with demo', '') , '') , 'NA')
CustomField.label: GL_Type
